# Workflow

4 capabilities | 30 met / 37 total acceptance criteria

## Capabilities

### [Autonomous Lifecycle Runner](./autonomous-lifecycle.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 15/17 (2 pending)

Enable the genie-team PDLC to run in configurable phase ranges — from daily discover+define pipelines to full overnight delivery — both within an interactive Claude session and via external scheduling.

### [Cross-Item Obligation Tracking](./cross-item-obligations.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 0/5 (5 pending)

When work on one backlog item defers a step to another item, the obligation must be tracked structurally with enforcement at delivery, review, and archival checkpoints.

### [Lifecycle Phase Orchestration](./lifecycle-orchestration.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

The workflow orchestration system chains genies through the 7 D's lifecycle via multiple modes: /feature (guided), /bugfix, /spike, /cleanup (shortcuts), /commit, /done, /handoff, and context management commands.

### [Parallel Sessions via Git Worktrees](./parallel-sessions.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 11/11 (all met)

Enable multiple genie-team sessions to work on the same local git repository simultaneously using git worktrees, each on a separate branch with no file or index conflicts.
